verdict_reason: 3.10's engineering layer does not trivialize the original. The Sanskrit terminology is preserved; the metaphysical scope (where it exceeds the analog) is registered honestly via STRETCHED tags; the chapter-3 hard edges (impossibility of non-action, the hypocrite, the thief, eats-sin) are NOT softened in the engineering body. The traditional meaning consensus is preserved alongside the engineering layer per source.traditional_meaning_consensus.
